title: Supervise ecological restoration works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise ecological restoration works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify scope of ecological restoration works
